title: Valid and recalibratable conformal prediction sets on frozen foundation-model embeddings for tuberculosis chest radiograph triage: a correction and evaluation study — Analysis Code
description: Reproducibility code for: Valid and recalibratable conformal prediction sets on frozen foundation-model embeddings for tuberculosis chest radiograph triage: a correction and evaluation study. Includes all analysis scripts, Colab notebooks for GPU-intensive steps, pre-computed results, and an interactive Streamlit demo.
